examples: On a sunny day, spritz weeds with the solution until dripping wet.
Spritz on Windows and wipe clean with paper towels or a clean microfiber cloth.
But there's no way of knowing how you'll smell until you spritz yourself with the perfume.
Not all the scents in Ms. Beaulieu's book sound like something I'd spritz on before dinner.
Back in the office, the heels come on and she uses a spritz of the fragrance.
